feed.title: AppVibe Studio — Business insights
feed.subtitle: Landing pages, WhatsApp CTAs, and digital presence for growing businesses.

entry.title: Social Proof on Landing Pages: Real Examples Used by Service Businesses
entry.summary: Testimonials, numbers, and client logos — which ones actually increase trust and conversion on landing pages.

entry.title: How to Measure Landing Page Conversion Without Expensive Tools
entry.summary: A simple framework for small businesses and service providers who want to know if their landing page is actually generating chats and leads.

entry.title: 5 WhatsApp Copy Mistakes That Make Prospects Ghost You Instantly
entry.summary: Messages that are too long, unclear, or overly salesy — these are the real reasons prospects stop replying to your WhatsApp.

entry.title: Dedicated Landing Page vs Homepage: Which One Actually Converts Paid Traffic?
entry.summary: Why sending all ad traffic to your homepage often kills conversions — and when you should create a campaign-specific landing page instead.

entry.title: Landing pages + WhatsApp: CTAs that actually start conversations
entry.summary: Page structure, button copy, and prefilled messages — patterns that reliably increase response rates for service businesses in Indonesia.
